title: Selaginella ornithopodioides
taxonomy: Selaginella ornithopodioides is a species of spore-producing plant in the genus Selaginella. The genus Selaginella is classified under the family Selaginellaceae and the order Selaginellales. This plant belongs to the division Lycopodiophyta, which is a group of vascular plants that produce spores instead of seeds. The classification of Selaginella ornithopodioides is further supported by its distinctive features and characteristics, including its fern-like appearance and unique leaf structure. Overall, the classification of Selaginella ornithopodioides reflects its evolutionary relationships with other vascular plants.
